title: Gro-Sure Multi-Purpose Grass Lawn Seed, 50 m2, 1.5 kg
features: Pack features a handy built in easy to use seed applicator.
Creates a lush, green durable lawn.
Ideal for establishing new lawns and over-seeeding exising lawns.
description: From the manufacturer Gro-Sure Multi-Purpose Lawn Seed has been crafted as a great option for all lawns, promoting strong establishment. Gro-Sure Multi-Purpose Lawn Seed can be used for both sowing a new lawn and overseeding. Key benefits Perfect for new lawns and overseeding Strong establishment Deters birds Maintains colour all season long New and improved seed blends Our range is colour-matched Fine grass blades for a lush, beautiful lawn Our lawn seed will grow on any soil type Your lawn will have a high disease tolerance Consistent results: specially selected seeds Germination success: unique seed treatment for strong growth Get the lawn you want: a green, lush lawn Best time to sow lawn seed is in Spring from April to May and in Autumn from September to October Avoid cold soil temperatures (below 10°C) & hot conditions (above 19°C) Overseeding: add new grass seed to your lawn 2x per season (Spring & Autumn) for an easy to maintain, thick & strong lawn which outcompetes weeds & moss. Feed your lawn on a regular basis to keep it strong, thick and easy to maintain. We recommend Westland SafeLawn, Aftercut Ultra Green Plus or Aftercut Lawn Thickener. Apply Gro-Sure Lawn Seeding Soil, before seeding, to increase germination by up to 25%.
